Flexible Solutions International ( (FSI) ) just unveiled an update.

On June 30, 2026, Flexible Solutions International entered into an at-the-market (ATM) sales agreement with Bancroft Capital, allowing the sale and issuance of up to $18.5 million of its common stock under an effective Form S-3 shelf registration. Under the agreement, the company will pay Bancroft a 3% cash fee on gross proceeds, reimburse up to $30,000 of its expenses, and cover additional quarterly costs, formalizing standard indemnification, conditions, and termination terms that shape how future share issuances will be conducted.

data.title: i-80 Gold advances Ruby Hill drilling and development
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from i-80 Gold Corp ( (TSE:IAU) ) is now available.

i-80 Gold reported on June 25, 2026, that its 2025-2026 infill drilling campaign in the upper 426 zone of the Archimedes Underground Project at Ruby Hill delivered additional high-grade gold intercepts, including 16.2 grams per tonne over 56.4 meters, confirming wide, continuous mineralization and expanding beyond the current resource model. The campaign, totaling about 8,500 meters across 40 holes and completed on schedule in April 2026, also outlined significant oxide intervals that could offer lower-cost processing options, supporting plans to start mining in 2026 and eventually supply the refurbished Lone Tree plant, even as feasibility study timelines for Granite Creek and Cove were pushed to the third quarter of 2026 and Archimedes’ feasibility work advances toward 2027.

i-80 Gold said development of Archimedes remains on budget and on schedule, with first gold targeted for the fourth quarter of 2026 and existing permits covering mining above the 5,100-foot level while permitting for deeper zones progresses toward an expected mid-2027 completion. A new 2026 drilling phase of roughly 55,000 meters in the lower 426 and Ruby Deeps zones is underway using up to seven underground rigs to upgrade and expand resources, refine the oxide-sulfide boundary, and underpin an updated mine plan and feasibility study that aim to secure long-term feed for the Lone Tree plant and reinforce the company’s growth profile in northeastern Nevada.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:IAU) stock is a Buy
with a C$5.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on i-80 Gold Corp stock,
see the TSE:IAU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IAU is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (persistent losses, cash burn, and increased leverage). Technicals also lean negative with the stock trading below key short-to-mid-term moving averages and a negative MACD. The earnings call provides a partial offset due to strong liquidity and clear, funded growth execution plans with improving revenue/gross profit, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on IAU stock,
click here.

More about i-80 Gold Corp

i-80 Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused gold mining and development company listed on the NYSE and TSX, with a portfolio centered on underground deposits such as Archimedes, Granite Creek and Cove. The company’s strategy is to build a long-life production base by feeding multiple high-grade underground mines into its Lone Tree processing complex, including both oxide and sulfide circuits, while also utilizing third-party toll milling in the interim.

Average Trading Volume: 1,580,140

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.77B

Learn more about IAU stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: RREEF Property Trust Declares Differentiated June 2026 Distributions
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

RREEF Property Trust, Inc. Class A ( (ZRPTAX) ) has shared an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, RREEF Property Trust, Inc. declared monthly distributions for June 2026 across all its common stock classes, with payments scheduled for July 2, 2026 to stockholders of record as of July 1, 2026. Net distributions per share differ by class due to dealer manager and distribution fees, leaving fee-bearing classes such as Class A, I, T, and T2 with lower net payouts than no-load classes including Class D, M-I, N, and Z, which receive the full gross distribution of $0.07495 per share.

The announcement underscores how the company’s fee structure directly affects investor cash yields, with certain classes absorbing higher distribution-related costs that reduce net income to shareholders. This differentiation may influence investor preference among share classes, as those without dealer manager and distribution fees deliver higher immediate cash returns, highlighting the trade-off between distribution costs and net investment income within the firm’s capital structure.

More about RREEF Property Trust, Inc. Class A

RREEF Property Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that offers multiple classes of common stock to investors, providing access to diversified income-producing property assets. The company targets income-focused shareholders through structured distribution policies that vary by share class based on embedded fee arrangements.

For a thorough assessment of ZRPTAX stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MindWalk Files European Patent for High-Dimensional Biological Data Layer Powering AI Drug Discovery
data.description:

MindWalk Holdings ( (HYFT) ) has provided an announcement.

MindWalk Holdings has filed a new European patent application covering high-dimensional biological data structures that support its HYFT technology, ReefIQ context layer, and LensAI reasoning workflows, according to a July 1, 2026 announcement. The filing aims to protect a model-agnostic representation layer that organizes multi-modal biological context around recurring patterns, positioning the company to capture value as AI in drug discovery becomes increasingly dependent on domain-specific data architectures.

The patent builds on MindWalk’s existing HYFT estate by adding a reusable biological meaning layer designed to make AI-driven discovery more traceable, grounded, and reusable across customer programs. By anchoring its platform strategy in this context-rich data layer, already demonstrated in preclinical dengue and influenza programs and deployed with recurring LensAI customers, MindWalk seeks to strengthen its competitive position and create a scalable infrastructure asset as AI-enabled drug discovery spending grows.

The most recent analyst rating on (HYFT) stock is a Buy
with a $5.00 price target.

Its core HYFT technology encodes 660 million biological patterns and 25 billion relationships into a function-aware representation that powers ReefIQ, a biological context layer, and LensAI, an AI reasoning platform for target discovery and portfolio decision support.

data.title: NewGenIvf Group to Implement One-for-Three Reverse Stock Split on July 6, 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

NewGenIvf Group ( (NIVF) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 4, 2026, NewGenIvf Group’s board approved a one-for-three reverse stock split covering all issued and unissued shares, including its Class A ordinary shares, without requiring shareholder approval under BVI law. The reverse split will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on July 6, 2026, when the Class A shares begin trading on a split-adjusted basis on Nasdaq under the same symbol but with a new CUSIP.

The transaction will reduce outstanding Class A shares from 10,259,764 to about 3,419,922, with every three existing shares automatically combined into one and fractional entitlements rounded up to a whole share at the participant level. Post-split, all options, warrants and other convertible securities will be adjusted by a factor of three while the share par value and unlimited authorized share capital remain unchanged, indicating a capital structure move that reshapes the share count without altering overall authorization or nominal value.

More about NewGenIvf Group

NewGenIvf Group Limited is a Thailand-based company whose Class A ordinary shares are listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker “NIVF.” The company operates as a foreign private issuer, filing reports with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission under Form 20-F and maintaining its principal executive offices in Bangkok.

Average Trading Volume: 5,841,357

Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited ( (CGTL) ) has shared an update.

On June 16, 2026, Creative Global Technology Holdings Limited’s board approved a one-for-15 reverse stock split of its Class A and Class B ordinary shares, consolidating every 15 existing shares into one share without amending its governing charter. The move affects all outstanding ordinary shares equally and is part of the company’s capital restructuring efforts to address its trading price.

The reverse split is expected to become effective on July 6, 2026, with CGTL shares trading on a split-adjusted basis on Nasdaq from the start of trading on July 7, 2026, under a new CUSIP. Management expects the higher post-split share price to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq’s $1.00 minimum bid requirement, a step that could reduce delisting risk and provide greater stability for shareholders and other market participants.

data.title: Greenpro Capital Settles Litigation, Exits MFAI Investment
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Greenpro Capital ( (GRNQ) ) just unveiled an update.

On June 24, 2026, Greenpro Capital Corp. entered into a confidential settlement agreement with Millennium Fine Art Inc., resolving all claims in a Nevada state court case and related arbitration tied to an alleged 2021 NFT-related contract. Under the settlement, subject to closing conditions, Greenpro will pay MFAI $100,000 and surrender 2,000,000 restricted Class B common shares, representing its entire equity interest of about 5% of MFAI’s issued shares and roughly 1% of its voting rights.

These shares were originally acquired on July 1, 2020 as consideration for Greenpro’s sale of its 4% stake in the 12.3-kilogram Millennium Sapphire, an asset in which MFAI holds full ownership. Following the exchange of the settlement consideration, the parties will dismiss the litigation and arbitration with prejudice, enter into mutual general releases, and the agreement specifies that its performance does not constitute an admission of liability; Greenpro’s board approved the settlement on June 15, 2026, and the move effectively terminates its investment relationship with MFAI while removing ongoing legal overhang.

More about Greenpro Capital

Greenpro Capital Corp. is a diversified investment and corporate advisory company that engages in strategic holdings and financial services, including interests in alternative assets such as precious stones and related ventures. The company has previously held an equity stake in Millennium Fine Art Inc. (MFAI) through restricted Class B common shares obtained as consideration for the sale of a minority interest in the Millennium Sapphire asset.

Richmond Mutual Bancorporation ( (RMBI) ) has shared an update.

Effective July 1, 2026, Richmond Mutual Bancorporation completed its stock-for-stock merger with The Farmers Bancorp, issuing approximately 6.25 million new shares and folding The Farmers Bank into First Bank Richmond, which was simultaneously rebranded as First Bank Midwest. The combined company retains the Richmond Mutual Bancorporation name, continues to trade under the Nasdaq ticker RMBI, and now operates all branches under the First Bank Midwest banner, with corporate headquarters in Richmond and bank headquarters in Frankfort, Indiana.

As part of the transaction, Richmond and First Bank Midwest expanded their boards from six to eleven members by adding five former Farmers directors, with former Farmers chair Barbara A. Cutillo named vice chair and Farmers’ former CEO Christopher D. Cook appointed president of Richmond and CEO of First Bank Midwest. Several other senior roles were filled by former Farmers executives, who entered into change-in-control agreements, underscoring a leadership integration aimed at leveraging complementary community banking markets and creating a larger regional franchise for employees, customers and shareholders.

Spark’s Take on RMBI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RMBI is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improving operating performance with cash flow broadly backing earnings, but tempered by elevated leverage in recent annual filings and data inconsistencies in the latest-period balance sheet/cash flow. Technicals add support via a strong uptrend and positive MACD, while valuation is reasonable with a moderate P/E and attractive dividend yield. Recent merger approval and the quarterly dividend are constructive corporate catalysts.

More about Richmond Mutual Bancorporation

Richmond Mutual Bancorporation, Inc., headquartered in Richmond, Indiana, is the holding company for First Bank Midwest, a community-oriented financial institution. It offers traditional financial and trust services through a network of branches across multiple communities in Indiana and Ohio, focusing on serving local retail and small business customers.

Its portfolio of 22 brands spans full-service upper upscale, midscale, extended-stay and economy segments, supported by the Choice Privileges rewards program and co-branded credit cards aimed at driving value for travelers and franchise owners.

The company focuses on meeting diverse traveler needs while enhancing unit economics for franchisees and delivering returns to shareholders through its scalable franchising model and technology-enabled guest offerings.

Keshavarz, currently President and Chief Data & Analytics Officer at CVS Health and former McKinsey healthcare analytics leader, brings extensive experience in enterprise data, analytics and AI transformation, and will receive compensation consistent with other non-employee directors. data.title: Biophytis Posts Provisional 2025 Results as Trading Suspended Pending Audit
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Biophytis ( (BPTSY) ).

Biophytis reported on July 1, 2026 that 2025 was a pivotal year, highlighted by a memorandum of understanding with Asian partners to form a Hong Kong joint venture, which will fund up to US$20 million over three years to advance BIO101 for sarcopenia across China, South Korea and Japan. The company also progressed regulatory approvals for its planned Phase 3 SARA-31 trial in sarcopenia and Phase 2 OBA obesity study, and deepened its use of artificial intelligence, reinforcing its positioning at the intersection of longevity biotech and AI.

Provisional, unaudited 2025 results showed no revenue, a net loss of €7.8 million at company level and cash of €190,000 at year-end, with management warning of material uncertainty over going-concern status beyond September 30, 2026 without additional funding. Trading in Biophytis shares on Euronext Growth Paris has been suspended since June 15, 2026 due to delays in publishing audited 2025 accounts, with the company expecting to release audited financial statements and see trading resume by the end of July 2026 after a series of equity injections, debt conversions and a bond facility aimed at shoring up its capital base.

Spark’s Take on BPTSY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BPTSY is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing cash burn, and negative equity), reinforced by bearish technicals with the stock trading below major moving averages. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support, with only a minor offset from oversold momentum readings.

click here.

More about Biophytis

Biophytis SA is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for age-related diseases, notably sarcopenia and obesity. The company’s lead candidate, BIO101, targets preservation of muscle strength and mobility, while Biophytis is also building an AI-driven drug discovery platform through partnerships such as its alliance with Lynx Analytics.

data.title: UBS AG Updates U.S. Tax Counsel Opinion for Debt Securities Shelf
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

ETRACS Alerian MLP Index ETN Class B ( (AMUB) ) has provided an announcement.

UBS AG, the Swiss-based global financial institution, has updated the U.S. tax counsel opinion tied to its shelf registration for debt securities on Form F-3, originally filed in December 2024 and effective in February 2025. The change, dated July 1, 2026, designates Hogan Lovells Cadwalader US LLP as special U.S. tax counsel, replacing the prior opinion from Cadwalader, Wickersham & Taft LLP for these offerings.

The newly filed opinion confirms that the U.S. tax discussions in UBS’s prospectus materials for its delayed and continuous debt offerings reflect Hogan Lovells Cadwalader’s views, and it is now formally incorporated into the registration statement. The move refines the legal and tax framework underpinning UBS’s ongoing capital-raising program in the U.S. market, providing updated clarity to investors on federal tax considerations related to its structured and other debt securities.

data.title: ExxonMobil Completes Redomiciliation and Holding Company Transition
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Exxon Mobil ( (XOM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ExxonMobil completed a redomiciliation merger in which each share of its common stock was automatically exchanged for an equivalent share of ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation common stock, making the new Texas‑governed entity the publicly traded successor on the NYSE. Existing shareholders and holders of equity awards maintained their proportional ownership and award terms, while ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation’s stock is expected to begin trading under the XOM ticker on July 2, 2026, following the July 1, 2026 suspension and planned delisting of the old ExxonMobil stock.

In connection with the merger, ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation became the successor registrant under the Securities Exchange Act, and its subsidiary ExxonMobil entered into a supplemental indenture under which ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation fully and unconditionally guaranteed ExxonMobil’s senior unsecured notes without changing ExxonMobil’s role as primary obligor. At the effective time, ExxonMobil’s prior board and named executive officers resigned, and a new, smaller slate of directors and officers was appointed to the ExxonMobil subsidiary, aligning the internal corporate structure with the new holding-company framework while leaving the top leadership of ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation unchanged.

The most recent analyst rating on (XOM) stock is a Buy
with a $168.00 price target.

data.title: Sify Technologies Files July 2026 Form 6-K, Furnishing FY 2025-26 Indian GAAP Annual Report
data.description:

Sify Technologies ( (SIFY) ) has issued an update.

On July 1, 2026, Sify Technologies Limited filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the month of July 2026, furnishing its statutory annual report for fiscal year 2025-2026 prepared under Indian Accounting Standards as mandated by India’s Companies Act. The company noted that investors seeking its IFRS-compliant financials should refer to its Form 20-F annual report filed with the SEC on June 25, 2026, underscoring its dual-reporting framework for Indian and international stakeholders while clarifying that the 6-K materials are furnished rather than filed for Exchange Act liability purposes.

This dual disclosure approach highlights Sify’s effort to meet regulatory obligations in both India and the United States, potentially improving transparency and comparability for cross-border investors. By formally distinguishing between its Indian GAAP-equivalent statements and IFRS reporting, Sify aims to align with different accounting frameworks without expanding legal exposure under Section 18 of the Exchange Act, an important nuance for institutional shareholders and analysts tracking the company’s filings.

Spark’s Take on SIFY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SIFY is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (net losses, rising leverage, and negative free cash flow from heavy capex). The earnings call provides a meaningful offset due to strong Data Center/Network momentum and contracted backlog, while technicals are neutral-to-soft and valuation is constrained by unprofitability and no dividend data.

The latest update is out from Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp ( (TYG) ).

On July 1, 2026, Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corporation implemented a planned board transition following the previously disclosed resignation of director Alexandra Herger, who had notified the company of her decision by letter dated April 24, 2026. The board appointed John Maxwell, a 63-year-old investment professional with decades of portfolio management and analyst experience and a Chartered Financial Analyst designation, to succeed Herger as a director and member of the Nominating and Governance Committee.

Maxwell, who retired in 2021 from his role as lead portfolio manager at Delaware Ivy Investments/Waddell & Reed/Ivy Investments and currently serves as an independent trustee for Tortoise Capital Series Trust, has been nominated to stand for election to a three-year term as a Class I director at the 2026 annual meeting. The company emphasized that Maxwell has no prior material relationship with Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corporation or its adviser and will be compensated under the same 2025 director compensation framework that applies to other board members, underscoring a standard, independent governance structure for stakeholders.

More about Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp

Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corporation is a closed-end investment company focused on energy infrastructure assets, providing investors with exposure to sectors such as midstream and related energy businesses. The company is advised by Tortoise Capital Advisors, L.L.C., and operates under a board-governed structure that emphasizes independent oversight and governance committees.

DB Gold Double Long Exchange Traded Notes ( (DGP) ) has issued an update.

On June 30, 2026, Deutsche Bank reported key second-quarter updates, highlighting that it is exiting selected businesses and non-performing exposures to enhance shareholder value, including the sale of its retail, private banking and wealth management operations in India to Kotak Mahindra Bank. These actions are expected to raise second-quarter expenses and credit loss provisions by about €100 million each, but management says associated capital relief and balance sheet optimization should offset the impact over time.

The bank reiterated full-year 2026 cost guidance at slightly above €21 billion and confirmed plans for €0.9 billion of investments, while guiding to Q2 revenue growth in private banking and investment banking and a normalization of asset management fees. Management expressed confidence in achieving around €33 billion of group revenue in 2026 and maintaining the CET1 ratio in the mid-range of 13.5–14.0%, supporting a 60% payout policy and another share buyback, as Fitch upgraded Deutsche Bank’s long-term rating to A+ following strong issuance and capital actions.

More about DB Gold Double Long Exchange Traded Notes

Deutsche Bank AG is a global financial services institution headquartered in Frankfurt, operating across retail, private and wealth management, corporate banking, investment banking and asset management. It focuses on European and international markets, reporting under EU-endorsed IFRS with an emphasis on portfolio hedge accounting and value-accretive capital allocation.

An update from Mueller Industries ( (MLI) ) is now available.

On June 1, 2026, Mueller Industries, Inc. announced a two-for-one forward stock split of its issued common stock, to be implemented via an amendment to its Restated Certificate of Incorporation in Delaware. On June 29, 2026, the company filed this amendment, increasing its authorized common shares from 250 million to 500 million, with the change becoming effective at 4:01 p.m. Eastern Time that day.

Following these actions, Mueller Industries’ stock is set to begin trading on a split-adjusted basis at the market open on July 1, 2026, effectively doubling the number of shares outstanding while halving the price per share. This move is expected to enhance liquidity and broaden investor access to the stock, potentially supporting trading activity and reinforcing the company’s presence in the equity markets.
